scripts.spec:verify: node tools/buildspec/extract.mjs --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json --out extracted.mmd && node tools/buildspec/gate.mjs --spec docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --code extracted.mmd --unplanned-as-warning
scripts.verify: npm run verify:types && npm run verify:lint && npm run verify:deps && npm run spec:verify
scripts.flowmap:ship: npm run flowmap:bundle && npm run flowmap:bodies && echo 'DONE: load docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd in flowmap; source tab is populated.'
scripts.flowmap:test: node tools/flowmap/bundle.mjs --check --root tools/flowmap/fixtures/root.mmd tools/flowmap/fixtures/blockManager.mmd tools/flowmap/fixtures/selectionManager.mmd && node tools/flowmap/bundle.mjs --root tools/flowmap/fixtures/root.mmd tools/flowmap/fixtures/blockManager.mmd tools/flowmap/fixtures/selectionManager.mmd > tools/flowmap/fixtures/_out.mmd && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs tools/flowmap/fixtures/_out.mmd
